name: Western Illinois Electrical Coop
territory: Adams, Brown, Pike, and Schuyler counties, western Illinois

netMetering.policy: Net metering at retail rate for systems ≤ 40 kW
netMetering.notes: Illinois Net Metering Act (220 ILCS 5/16-107.5) applies; western IL near Missouri border

interconnection.applicationFeeNotes: Standard residential fee for systems ≤ 10 kW; engineering study for larger systems

incentives.notes: Illinois Shines (ABP) available; western IL rural territory
